chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-688 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 16.05.2023 Mr. Mumtaz Sachal Awan advocate for petitioners aloingwth petitioners. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh along with SIP Imran Akhtar Chandio SHO City Tando Muhammad Khan on behalf of SSP Tando Muhammad Khan, Inspector Tufail Ahmed Legal Branch SSP Office Tando Muhammad Khan and IO/ASI PS Husri. ----- Petitioner No.1 has stated that she has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 out of her own freewill and choice but against wishes of her parents hence being annoyed her father has got subject FIR lodged which is based on wrong facts. IO present has recorded statement of petitioner No.1 in which she has reiterated the same facts. In the light of her statement, the I.O is directed to dispose of this case and would submit such report before the learned Magistrate concerned. After such report is submitted, learned Magistrate concerned shall pass an appropriate order on said report in the light of recommendation of the I.O. disposing of the case, in accordance with law. Petitioners and their counsel are satisfied and seek disposal of the petition in the above terms. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. Police officials present are directed to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
